name: Alipay-PIBench: A Realistic Payment Integration Benchmark for Coding Agents

description: arXiv:2607.14573v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Payment integration is a demanding repository-level software task: agents must select a suitable product, implement coordinated client-server flows, verify payment outcomes, and preserve consistency between transaction and business states. We introduce Alipay-PIBench, a benchmark for evaluating coding agents on realistic Alipay payment integra...
author: Shiyu Ying, Xuejie Cao, Yingfan Ma, Yuanhao Dong, Wenyu Chen, Bowen Song, Lin Zhu
